entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Para Español, oprima el 2.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI.
Am I speaking with Maria?
Hi, I'm calling to check on some
Thanks for letting me know.
Oh, actually, this is Linda Martinez. I'm a new patient.
Linda, I can help you get started as a new patient.
Yes, I'd like to know your office hours, especially on weekdays.
How can I assist you today?
Thanks. Do you have any Saturday hours, or evenings besides Wednesday?
Are you looking to schedule your first appointment, or do you have another question?
Got it.
Our clinic is open Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m., Wednesday from 12 p.m. to 7 p.m., and Friday from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m.
Thanks. Could you tell me your exact location or address?
Let me know if you need more details or want to schedule an appointment.
That's perfect, thank you. I think that covers everything I needed. Appreciate your help, goodbye.
We are not open on Saturdays, and the only evening hours are on Wednesdays when we're open until 7 p.m.
If you need a specific time, I can help you find the closest available slot.
Our clinic is located at 1234 Recovery Way, Suite 200, Austin.
If you need directions or more details, just let me know.
